Look at the graph in Figure 22 and identify the following for the function $$j ( t ) :$$ ⓐ y- intercept ⓑ x -intercept(s) ⓒ slope ⓓ Is $$j ( t )$$ parallel or perpendicular to $$h ( t )$$ (or neither)? ⓔ Is $$j ( t )$$ an increasing or decreasing function (or neither)? ⓕ Write a transformation description for $$j ( t )$$ from the identity toolkit function $$f ( x ) = x .$$
Answer: ⓐ $$( 0 , 5 )$$ ⓑ $$( 5 , \text{ 0} )$$ ⓒ Slope -1 ⓓ Neither parallel nor perpendicular ⓔ Decreasing function ⓕ Given the identity function, perform a vertical flip (over the t -axis) and shift up 5 units.
